verdict: LeBron James is an elite, franchise-altering player delivering unparalleled impact.
strengths: His 98.4 percentile impact score, 15.4 wins added, and 99.8% playoff probability confirm his steady, top-tier performance.
concern: While currently performing at an elite level, future age-related decline, though not yet evident, is the only long-term risk to monitor.
recommendation: Sign LeBron immediately, as his requested $20M salary is an incredible value given his $68.55M fair value and -70.8% overpay percentage.
audio_summary: LeBron James is an elite, steady force adding over 15 wins to any team, practically guaranteeing playoff contention. His requested salary is a massive bargain for a player delivering such high impact and efficiency.
